pcRequirements.title: WWE 2K26 PC Requirements
pcRequirements.subtitle: Check if your PC can run WWE 2K26

minimum.processor: Intel Core i7-4770 or AMD Ryzen 5 1500X
minimum.graphics: NVIDIA RTX 2060 or AMD Radeon RX 5700
minimum.notes: GPU must have at least 6 GB VRAM; CPU must support AVX2 and F16C

recommended.processor: Intel Core i7-7700 or AMD Ryzen 5 2600
recommended.graphics: NVIDIA RTX 3060 or AMD Radeon RX 6700 XT
recommended.notes: At least 12 GB VRAM; CPU must support AVX2 and F16C

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about WWE 2K26

questions.question: When is WWE 2K26 released?
questions.answer: WWE 2K26 standard edition releases on March 13, 2026. Deluxe editions get early access starting March 6, 2026.

questions.question: How many superstars are in WWE 2K26?
questions.answer: WWE 2K26 features over 400 playable superstars, including legends, current roster, and DLC characters.

questions.question: What platforms is WWE 2K26 available on?
questions.answer: WWE 2K26 is available on PS5, Xbox Series X|S, Steam (PC), and Nintendo Switch 2.

questions.question: How do I redeem WWE 2K26 locker codes?
questions.answer: Go to MyFACTION mode, select the Locker Code menu, and enter the code. Check our codes page for the latest active codes.

questions.question: What are the new match types in WWE 2K26?
questions.answer: WWE 2K26 introduces 4 new match types including Inferno Match, Dumpster Match, Three Stages of Hell, and I Quit Match.

questions.question: What game modes are in WWE 2K26?
questions.answer: WWE 2K26 includes MyGM, MyRISE, Universe Mode, Showcase (CM Punk), The Island, MyFACTION, and Creation Suite.
